creator: jjuanino@gmail.com
text:
Dear FreeBSD committer:

I send a patch to update xmlcopyeditor port from 1.1.0.6 to 1.2.0 version

# cd /usr/ports/editors/xmlcopyeditor
# patch -p1 < pathToPatch.diff
# rm *.orig files/*.orig

Version 1.2.0 introduces background validation

Please remove files/{patch-aclocal.m4.diff,pkg-message.in} from cvs, as they are not needed anymore.

Best regards

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
